\tzpentry{ID4901}{Pressure Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4901 introduces Pressure Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[P(t) = P_0 e^{-(S/V)t} + \sum \eta_{\text{gas}} \langle \hat{\sigma}_{\text{coll}} \rangle \implies P_{\text{limit}} \approx 10^{-9} \text{ Pa}\]
